content:
type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
your_files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Both our features extend exif_transpose so we can't get disjoint files. Proposal to avoid clobbering: (1) each of us adds our new parameter as a keyword-only arg appended at the END of the exif_transpose signature (after existing params), so param order won't conflict; (2) don't reformat/touch each other's unrelated lines in the function body - just add an if-block for our own param; (3) in test_imageops.py, append new test functions at the end of the file rather than editing existing tests. My param: strip_metadata=False. What's your param name so we can sequence signatures predictably?
